ofm.title: OnlyMonster
ofm.summary: has become the dominant AI-integrated OnlyFans management platform, outpacing competitors purely through product without marketing — agencies using AI to fully operate accounts is now mainstream ([onlymonster.ai](https://onlymonster.ai/))

ofm.title: Fanvue raised $22M Series A
ofm.summary: in Jan 2026 (Inner Circle investors behind Revolut/Anthropic) — AI model platform is getting serious backing and legitimacy ([slobodskyi.com](https://slobodskyi.com/monetize/memberships/fanvue))

ofm.title: AI influencer market hit $6-7B in 2026
ofm.summary: , growing 26%+ annually — brands allocating 30% of marketing budgets to AI influencers by 2026 ([imagine.art](https://www.imagine.art/blogs/how-ai-influencers-make-money), [success.com](https://www.success.com/how-ai-influencers-generate-millions-per-year))

tools.title: OpenClaw 2026.3.2
tools.summary: focused on trust/reliability for production workflows — new secrets system, safer defaults, PDF tool, and plugin API compatibility fixes ([github.com/openclaw/releases](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases))

tools.title: Claude Code hooks
tools.summary: now support PreToolUse automation (exit code 2 = block) — can build guardrails that auto-approve safe operations and escalate risky ones ([dev.to](https://dev.to/serenitiesai/claude-code-hooks-guide-2026-automate-your-ai-coding-workflow-dde))

tools.title: CrewAI + n8n + Make
tools.summary: are the leading multi-agent/workflow platforms — n8n added MCP support for local LLMs, Make pushes visual agent building ([crewai.com](https://crewai.com/), [n8n.io](https://n8n.io/))

tools.title: Latenode MCP
tools.summary: enables Claude to trigger real business actions across apps — moving beyond planning to actual execution without manual wiring ([reddit.com/r/ClaudeAI](https://www.reddit.com/r/ClaudeAI/comments/1rkkozb/anyone_else_using_claude_to_build_automation/))

market.title: Tulum ATV rental competition
market.summary: TripAdvisor now dominates search results — Lagoon Company appears but competing with aggressive SEO from "Tulum ATV Rental" and others offering free tequila bottles with rentals ([tripadvisor.com](https://www.tripadvisor.com/AttractionProductReview-g150813-d23783534-Tulum_Area_Experiences_ATV_Daily_Rental-Tulum_Yucatan_Peninsula.html))

market.title: Puerto Escondido real estate
market.summary: Entry window still open in 2026 but closing — infrastructure-driven appreciation coming; oceanfront lots (1,000-3,000 sqm) significantly undervalued vs Tulum/Playa; rental market showing strong year-round occupancy fundamentals ([realestate.puerto-escondido.mx](https://realestate.puerto-escondido.mx/puerto-escondido-real-estate-forecast-next-5-years))

market.title: Rammed earth construction
market.summary: Earth USA 2026 conference Sept 18-20 in Santa Fe — prefabricated rammed earth blocks gaining traction for quality control and speed; digitally-controlled compaction with Rhino/Grasshopper workflows now available ([earthusa.org](https://www.earthusa.org), [eartharchitecture.org](https://eartharchitecture.org/?m=202603))

actions.text: OFM: Test OnlyMonster's free tier to benchmark their AI chat capabilities against current Lagoon workflow — if superior, consider switching or adopting their patterns
AI Models: Apply for Fanvue AI Personality Awards (if running AI creators) — free exposure + signals legitimacy to investors/talent
Automation: Implement Claude Code hooks with PreToolUse guardrails for the OFM content pipeline — auto-approve safe operations, block risky ones without human review
Lagoon SEO: TripAdvisor dominance is a threat — need to audit why Lagoon ranks below competitors and consider paid TripAdvisor campaigns or review generation strategy
Oaxaca Land: Puerto Escondido window is closing — finalize Hilltop Villa permits and consider acquiring adjacent lots before infrastructure announcements drive prices up
Rammed Earth: Register for Earth USA 2026 conference (Sept 18-20, Santa Fe) — network with Sirewall contractors and see prefab block systems in person before finalizing CRETE construction method
